AU_TEXTSCHEMA.au_xsd: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xs:schema xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="Root"> <xs:annotation> <xs:appinfo> <XSDVersion>1</XSDVersion> <fieldSeparator>,</fieldSeparator> <recordSeparator>\n</recordSeparator> <allowDiscontinousOrder>false</allowDiscontinousOrder> <allowIgnoreCase>false</allowIgnoreCase> <allowMoreFields>false</allowMoreFields> <allowLessFields>false</allowLessFields> <removeLastNewLineSeperator>false</removeLastNewLineSeperator> <removeInvalidChar>false</removeInvalidChar> <enclosedChar></enclosedChar> <startRowNumber>1</startRowNumber> <skippedBottomRows>0</skippedBottomRows> <arrayLayout>false</arrayLayout> </xs:appinfo> </xs:annotation> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="Record" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:complexType><xs:sequence> <xs:element name="EMPA" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]EMPA[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="EMPB" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]EMPB[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="EMPBC" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]EMPBC[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="EMPBD" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]EMPBD[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="XYZ" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]XYZ[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="AWQ" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]AWQ[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="WDE" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]WDE[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="FGQ" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]FGQ[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="OPQ" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]OPQ[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> <xs:element name="ISA01" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation><xs:appinfo><format>AAAAAAAA</format><originalName>[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._START]ISA01[ABPM_._ESCAPE_._CDATA_._END]</originalName><parent> </parent> </xs:appinfo></xs:annotation></xs:element> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="recordNumber" type="xs:string" use="required"/> </xs:complexType></xs:element> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema>
AU_TEXTSCHEMA.AU_ENRICHED_JSON: [ { "xpath": "/Root/Record/@recordNumber", "type": "string", "business_context": "Unique record identifier for the Record element (source file row/record number).", "metadata": { "required": true, "unique": true, "max_length": 50, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "1", "0001" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/AWQ", "type": "string", "business_context": "Coverage code associated with the employee (plan or coverage identifier).", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": 20, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "MED", "COV1" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EMPA", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee address line 1 (primary street address).", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": 255, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "123 Main St", "PO Box 123" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EMPB", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee address line 2 (apartment, suite, or secondary address line).", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": 255, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "Apt 4B", "Suite 200" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EMPBC", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee city for the mailing or residential address.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": 100, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "San Francisco", "Chicago" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/EMPBD", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee state or province (typically US 2-letter state code).", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": 2, "pattern": "^[A-Z]{2}$", "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "CA", "NY" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/FGQ", "type": "date", "business_context": "Employee hire date.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": "^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$", "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "date", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "2020-06-15" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/ISA01", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee last name / family name.", "metadata": { "required": true, "unique": false, "max_length": 100, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "Smith", "O'Neil" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/OPQ", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee first name / given name.", "metadata": { "required": true, "unique": false, "max_length": 100, "pattern": null, "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "John", "Maria" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/WDE", "type": "date", "business_context": "Effective date (policy or coverage effective date).", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": null, "pattern": "^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$", "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "date", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "2023-01-01" ] } }, { "xpath": "/Root/Record/XYZ", "type": "string", "business_context": "Employee postal code / ZIP code.", "metadata": { "required": false, "unique": false, "max_length": 10, "pattern": "^\\d{5}(-\\d{4})?$", "enum_values": null, "min_value": null, "max_value": null, "format_type": "text", "default_value": null, "examples": [ "94105", "94105-1234" ] } } ]
